user_story: Forensic flow: I see address 0x812f11c3a7a82dc1fce12ad72dc69278e7391360 mentioned in a transaction — who are they on Zora? Look up the profile by address (not handle), then enumerate any coins they've deployed or trade activity they own.

turns.prompt: Look up the Zora profile for wallet address 0x812f11c3a7a82dc1fce12ad72dc69278e7391360. Confirm the handle, bio, social accounts, and whether they have a creator coin.
Get full detail on their creator coin if they have one — name, symbol, market cap, current price, holder count.
